title: UMI Event Object
description: Universal Machine Interface schema for system and application event logs.

Timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred.

Source.description: The application or component that logged the event.

EventId.description: Numeric identifier for the specific event type.

Message.description: The human-readable description of the event.

LogName.description: The name of the log the event belongs to.

User.description: The username associated with the event, if applicable.

MachineName.description: The name of the computer where the event occurred.

ProcessId.description: The PID of the process that generated the event.

ThreadId.description: The ID of the thread that generated the event.
